hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git push'; then echo 'Waiting for GitHub Actions run to complete...'; sleep 5; RUN_ID=$(gh run list --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId'); gh run watch "$RUN_ID" --exit-status 2>&1 || { echo 'GITHUB ACTIONS RUN FAILED. Please check the logs with: gh run view '"$RUN_ID"' --log-failed'; exit 1; }; echo 'GitHub Actions run succeeded.'; echo 'Smoke testing endpoints...'; sleep 5; for URL in https://ggame.nphunter.net/ https://nphunter.net/; do STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --connect-timeout 10 "$URL"); echo "$URL -> HTTP $STATUS"; if [ "$STATUS" != '200' ]; then echo "SMOKE TEST FAILED"; exit 1; fi; done; echo 'All endpoints OK.'; fi

allow: Bash(AWS_PROFILE=nphunter-sso pulumi import aws:route53/zone:Zone main-zone Z05670062ZTWRSY6PDM7V --yes 2>&1)
